hero.title: Go Beyond Limits
hero.subtitle: Unlock the full potential of your productivity with ACTIO Pro.

garants.title: Unlimited Garants
garants.description: Add as many accountability partners as you need. Configurable cascade escalation via SMS, WhatsApp, or email if a critical task is missed.

ai.title: AI Scheduling
ai.description: The AI learns your productivity patterns and suggests the best time slot for every task.

voice.title: Voice Task
voice.description: Just say what needs to be done. The AI extracts the title, time, and priority and creates the task.

analytics.title: Deep Analytics
analytics.description: Long-term trends, completion rate per garant, peak hours, and productivity streaks.

alarm.title: Smart Alarm
alarm.description: Custom sound included. Pro adds: progressive volume, location-based triggers, and contextual action from the alarm screen.

hero.title: Choose your plan
hero.subtitle: Start for free. Level up when you're ready.

pro.label: ACTIO PRO
pro.f6: Voice Task — AI audio to task

plan.desc: Unlimited access to all performance tools

mobileMoney.note: You will receive a confirmation request on your phone. Payment is secured via Moneroo.

paypal.redirect: You will be redirected to PayPal to complete the payment.

applePay.prompt: Tap the Apple Pay button to confirm.
